title: Add kurta suit product image with Lookout button linking to Amazon

requirements.text: Add a new promotional section to the ProductBrowse page that displays the uploaded pink kurta suit image (stored as frontend/public/assets/generated/kurta-suit-pink.dim_600x800.jpg) followed immediately below by a 'Lookout' button. Clicking the button must open https://amzn.to/4rGaVQa in a new tab.

quotes: Add this image below it add lookout button on clicking it redirect into https://amzn.to/4rGaVQa

acceptanceCriteria: The pink kurta suit image is visible in the ProductBrowse page as a promotional section.
A 'Lookout' button is rendered directly below the image.
Clicking the 'Lookout' button opens https://amzn.to/4rGaVQa in a new browser tab.
The section is styled consistently with the existing promotional sections (e.g., WatchProductSection, MeeshoProductSection).

constraints: The Amazon affiliate URL https://amzn.to/4rGaVQa must be used exactly as provided.
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Do not alter any existing promotional sections or product cards.
Do not add any product data to the backend for this item.

required: Woman wearing a pink printed kurta suit with dupatta, holding white flowers, on a plain light background (kurta-suit-pink.dim_600x800.jpg)
